title: ConvertKit vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs MailerLite. See pricing, features, ratings, and find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: ConvertKit vs MailerLite: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and MailerLite are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit targets creators and course sellers with advanced automation, while MailerLite appeals to budget-conscious small businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your email marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or course seller needing advanced automation and sequences
You want built-in commerce features and subscriber tagging capabilities
You're willing to pay more for creator-focused tools with strong feature sets
choose_b_if: You're on a tight budget and want affordability without sacrificing core features
You prefer an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and beginner-friendly interface
You need pop-ups and surveys for lead generation and audience engagement

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. ConvertKit excels for creators with advanced automation and commerce features, while MailerLite offers superior value for budget-conscious small businesses. MailerLite has higher customer satisfaction ratings, but ConvertKit provides more specialized creator tools.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. Both offer free plans with 1,000 subscribers, but MailerLite's paid tier offers better value for cost-conscious users and small businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list exports, making it possible to migrate your subscribers. Most email marketing tools allow CSV exports, so you can transfer your contacts to ConvertKit if needed. Review each platform's migration guides for a smooth transition.
